summary: The "Submit Feedback" link is visible and functional
gherkin:
When I am on the Streaming Operator Platform (SOP)
And I view the SOP side menu
Then I should see a hyperlink at the bottom of the menu
And the hyperlink should be labeled "Submit Feedback"
And clicking the "Submit Feedback" hyperlink should direct me to the URL
